name: campusgo_honesty_check

output.reason: CampusGo is not a federated learning system and has no distributed on-device model training pipeline.
CampusGo does not train AI content detectors or synthetic-data detection models; this gap is about detector model training dynamics.
CampusGo is not a campus IoT platform and does not implement differential-privacy synthetic data generation workflows.
CampusGo is not an educational content generation system across text/image/audio modalities.
CampusGo is not an edge-AI deployment setting with real-time lightweight model-collapse detection on constrained devices.
CampusGo does not include synthetic-data watermarking or iterative model training loops where watermark degradation can be studied.

CampusGo could be reframed as a campus activity/service recommendation context (ratings, categories, user behavior), but model-collapse and synthetic-data bias amplification are not core implemented features.
If CampusGo runs surveys/forms, AI-generated response detection could be added, but this is not a direct current feature and requires substantial extension.
CampusGo is not a multi-domain synthetic-data training research environment, so cross-domain model-collapse propagation is not directly testable.
CampusGo can support longitudinal user-platform metrics over time, but continuously learning AI intervention strategies for model collapse would require major new ML infrastructure.
